---
name: Repo standard
description: File locations, naming, PR description template
---

# Repo standard

## Workflow file location
`.github/workflows/deploy-<app-kebab>.yml`

## Filename patterns
| Type | Pattern |
|---|---|
| Main deploy | `deploy-<name>.yml` |
| Prereq | `deploy-<name>-prereq.yml` |
| DR | `deploy-<name>-dr.yml` |

## PR branch
`wf-generator/<jobid-8chars>/<filename-no-ext>`

## PR description template
```
## Generated by Workflow Generator
Source: <sourceType> — <sourceSummary>
Skill: <skillId> <version> · Job: <jobId>

### ⚠️ Blockers (resolve before merging)
<blockers or "None">

### Assumptions
<assumptions>

### Secrets to create
<secrets or "None">
```

## Multi-repo pattern (caller + shared template)
If input suggests shared template reuse:
- Caller repo: `deploy-<name>.yml` calling `org/shared-workflows/...`
- Shared repo: reusable workflow with `workflow_call`
- Note in `suggested_repo_structure`
